failures.description: The agent made an invalid tool invocation by calling ProductCatalogSearch with missing item_id and numeric product_id 0 instead of the provided string IDs.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The required information was available from the start: item_id "1096508426" and product_id "1808611083". The Researcher attempted ProductCatalogSearch with malformed arguments: {"product_id": 0}, omitting required item_id and using the wrong product_id value/type. The tool then explicitly returned a SchemaError, not an infra or access error.
